data.title: Ziegler secures $92,125,000 financing for United Methodist Retirement Homes in North Carolina.
data.description: Ziegler has recently completed the successful closure of The United Methodist Retirement Homes' Series 2025 Bonds, which totaled $92,125,000. The United Methodist Retirement Homes, based in North Carolina, is the entity associated with these bonds.

data.title: Darrin Jahnel appointed to Arrow Financial Corp. Board of Directors on Nov 25, 2025. CEO, entrepreneur, AI expert.
data.description: Recently, on November 25, 2025, Arrow Financial Corporation (NasdaqGS® - AROW) based in Glens Falls, N.Y., welcomed Darrin Jahnel to their Board of Directors. Jahnel, known for his expertise as a CEO, entrepreneur, and artificial intelligence specialist, brings a wealth of experience to the team. This appointment signifies a positive move for the company as they continue to strengthen their board with talented individuals.

data.title: Hillenbrand named to Newsweek's Most Responsible Companies 2026 list for its commitment to governance and sustainability.
data.description: For the second year in a row, Hillenbrand has been highlighted for its dedication to corporate responsibility through important governance and sustainability measures. The company, based in BATESVILLE, Ind., was acknowledged on Dec. 4, 2025. Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI), a key player in the global market, continues to show leadership in these areas.

data.title: Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) announces annual redemption of 281,167 units at $2.3119 per unit.
data.description: Toronto - On December 4, 2025, Energy Income Fund (TSX: ENI.UN) revealed details about the annual redemption of 281,167 units of the Fund. Each unit will be redeemed at a price of $2.3119.

data.title: Citadel Income Fund (TSX: CTF.UN) announces annual redemption of 284,514 units at $3.8905 per unit on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on December 4, 2025, Citadel Income Fund (TSX – CTF.UN) shared news that they are pleased to disclose the specifics of the annual redemption of 284,514 units of the Fund. The redemption price per unit has been set at $3.8905.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp. to host X Spaces event on Dec 5th, 2025 discussing business recap & AMA. Nasdaq: DFDV, treasury accumulating & compounding SOL.
data.description: In Boca Raton, FL, on Dec 04, 2025, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV), known for their unique treasury strategy centered on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL), revealed plans for a live X Spaces event scheduled for December 5, 2025, at 1:00 PM ET. This event marks a significant step for DFDV as the first U.S. public company to adopt such a strategy in the market.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines had a successful meeting with the FDA for ulixacaltamide in essential tremor, set to submit NDA in early 2026.
data.description: Praxis has officially announced its intention to submit the New Drug Application (NDA) for ulixacaltamide, targeted at essential tremor treatment, in the first quarter of 2026. This move demonstrates the company's strategic timeline for seeking regulatory approval for the medication aimed at addressing this common neurological disorder.

data.title: Capricor Therapeutics plans public stock offering, granting underwriters option for additional 15% of shares.
data.description: Capricor Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CAPR) based in San Diego, has revealed plans for an underwritten public offering of shares of its common stock on December 4, 2025. The company will also offer underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 15% of the total shares sold during the offering. The completion of this proposed offering is dependent on market factors and other conditions, with uncertainties regarding the final size and terms of the offering.
PARAMOUNT’S LAW FIRM WARNS WARNER BROS DISCOVERY, RAISING “SERIOUS CONCERNS” ABOUT FAIRNESS AND ADEQUACY OF THE BIDDING PROCESS FOR A POTENTIAL DEAL WITH WBD

data.title: AUGA group signs Agreement to sell 100% shares of UAB “Baltic Champs” to Global Champs owned by Mhitarjans family.
data.description: A binding preliminary agreement was signed on December 4, 2025, by AUGA Group subsidiary RAB, legal entity code 126264360, with Latvian-capital company Global Champs, UAB, legal entity code 307494558, owned by the Mhitarjans family. This agreement entails the sale of 100% of the shares of UAB “Baltic Champs”, legal entity code 302942064, as part of one of the strategic actions outlined in AUGA Group's restructuring plan.

data.title: Gulf Coast Commercial & Nexus Real Estate to develop Kroger-anchored shopping center in Fate, Texas on 70-acre land.
data.description: A new retail shopping center has been announced by Davidson Bogel Real Estate ("DB2RE") in Fate, Texas. The center will be anchored by The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) and is situated on a 70-acre property east of Lake Ray Hubbard. The project is a collaboration between Houston-based Gulf Coast Commercial Group and Nexus Real Estate Co. Fate is a growing community located between Royse City and Rockwall. The development also plans to include another major retail anchor user.

data.title: "ROLFS Global Institute Powered by L'Oréal debuts revolutionary documentary 'Does Beauty Matter' in Ariz., challenging industry norms." Character count: 120
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on December 4, 2025, Lead | ROLFS Global Institute Powered by L'Oréal unveiled its latest project, "Does Beauty Matter," a groundbreaking documentary aiming to transform perceptions of the beauty sector and its practitioners. This initiative is set to revolutionize the industry by shedding light on the work of professionals within it.

data.title: Poki wins 'Best in Business' at Dutch Game Awards with one billion plays per month, showing mass appeal of web gaming.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Amsterdam, the web gaming platform Poki achieved a significant milestone with one billion plays per month. This success underscores the widespread popularity of web gaming. Further, it was honored with the Best in Business award at the Dutch Game Awards, demonstrating its excellence within the industry.

data.title: Life Time's Hybrid Athlete Competition, LT Games presented by Ten Thousand, returns in 2026 in Minneapolis. Registration opens Dec 12.
data.description: After a successful debut in 2025, the LT Games are back due to popular demand. The event, organized by Life Time (NYSE: LTH) in Chanhassen, Minnesota, witnessed a sold-out attendance last year. Athletes and fans are eagerly anticipating the high-energy competition once again. Registration for the upcoming event will commence on December 12th. Stay tuned for more updates on the thrilling games that are set to resume.

data.title: Fusaka upgrade to Ethereum praised by developers and investors, seen as strategic milestone. Gas limit increased from 45M to 60M, signaling progress towards Ethereum's giga-gas future. Developers view upgrade positively, important for investors' confidence.
data.description: The Fusaka upgrade to Ethereum (ETH) has received positive feedback from developers and traditional finance sectors. Fidelity Digital Assets praised it as the most compelling upgrade in years, marking a strategic and economic turning point for Ethereum. VanEck's crypto research noted on Oct. 3 that Fusaka is vital for scaling Ethereum's ecosystem further. Fusaka aims to address the network's bottleneck by enhancing data availability for rollups, which are faster, cheaper mini-blockchains on Ethereum. The upgrade includes raising the gas limit from 45 million to 60 million units of computation, signifying progress towards Ethereum's giga-gas future. Mo Dong, CEO of Brevis, considers Fusaka essential for scaling throughput, as zkVMs become crucial infrastructure. Fusaka's popularity among developers is significant for Ethereum investors, as dissatisfaction may lead them to seek alternatives.

data.title: D6 Inc. acquires Richmond, IL extrusion facility from Good Natured Products, expanding its manufacturing footprint.
data.description: In Dallas today, D6 Inc. shared news of its acquisition of the extrusion facility in Richmond, Illinois, from Good Natured Products and associated entities. This move signifies D6's advancement in sustainable food-grade packaging with high PCR content. The transaction, conducted entirely in cash, aims to enhance D6's manufacturing presence within the country and bolster its commitment to a closed-loop operational approach. The acquired facility spans around 75,000 square feet, solidifying the company's position in the market. This strategic expansion showcases D6's dedication to growth and sustainability.

data.title: HaloMD adds three executive leaders to strengthen data, tech, compliance ops. Rural practices face financial pressures.
data.description: HaloMD, based in Addison, Texas, revealed on December 4, 2025, that three seasoned executive professionals have joined their team to bolster expertise in data, technology, and legal operations. This move comes at a critical time as financial challenges escalate for rural hospitals and independent practices in the healthcare sector. The new additions highlight the company's commitment to addressing pressing industry needs and ensuring comprehensive support for healthcare providers during these trying times.

data.title: MySmile launches "New Year, New Smile" campaign, encouraging upgrading oral care routine. #LA #Dec4425 #PRNewswire
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Los Angeles, a renowned company, MySmile, known for its at-home teeth whitening products and advanced oral care solutions, is starting off the year with a strong proclamation: "New Year, New Me, New Smile." Encouraging individuals to seize the opportunity for new beginnings, the brand is initiating a campaign aimed at promoting personal reinvention through improved oral health practices.

data.title: FIU researchers' discovery could revolutionize death investigations by aiding in estimating time of death using blow fly larvae.
data.description: In Miami on December 4, 2025, researchers at FIU made a significant breakthrough that may aid forensic investigators in better estimating the time of death. Typically, death investigations depend on maggots, which are the larvae of blow flies and one of the initial insects to infest a body post-mortem. This discovery could revolutionize the current methods used in estimating time of death by providing more accurate and reliable data to investigators.

data.title: Project "Relatos del Terruño" in Sinaloa aims to expand with new partners to share traditional and indigenous stories.
data.description: In Los Mochis, Mexico, Pacifico Mexinol is looking to expand its traditional and indigenous stories pilot program "Relatos del Terruño" by collaborating with new partners and incorporating additional voices. The program aims to amplify these stories and promote cultural heritage.
